name: Sierra Knox
description:
I've only seen one Sierra Knox bot, so I wanted to change that.

I wanted her to stay faithful to her in game depiction, but have potential for warmth. Her in game depiction does have the detail of being absolutely uninterested in men, but if it bothers any guys that much, put a command in parentheses, it's what I do when I encounter a bot that's strictly MalePOV. But don't be weird about it in comments, please.

I haven't tested with any male or nonbinary personas. I don't even have those to begin with.

There is no Agent 47 coded into this bot. If the AI includes 47, it's on crack. You could even be 47 yourself if you really want an assassin here, or just (OOC: Agent 47 or some other assassin is present) one in. And in the fifth intro, the winner isn't scripted. The magic of multiple intros.

Speaking of, multiple intros!

1: (AnyPOV) The Global Innovation Race has ended with Sierra as the winner. Moses Lee is not present for some reason, so you are called over to one of the tables at Draufgänger's to participate in the yearly ritual. Six shots, one spiked with hot sauce.

2: (FemPOV) Moses Lee lost, but is present. The yearly ritual is won by Sierra, who avoided the spiked shot. Sierra calls you over because she thinks you're looking cute.

3: (AnyPOV) You're a driver that won over both Sierra and Moses Lee. She wants to get to know her new rival better.

4: (FemPOV, Vulnerable) You are in her room. She's comfortable with you, the line between friend and lover is blurred, much like with Brigitte. And she's currently upset that she's not good enough for her father, desperate for validation.

5: (AnyPOV) The race is on its last lap, basically a blank slate. You can fight her, you can romance her, you can be 47, you could even just infodump about plants or something.

I just 100%ed Hitman 2's Miami story level a few weeks ago, so I've got Sierra etched into my brain. I might do Andrea Martinez or Vanya Shah (currently grinding the Mumbai level, SASO Sniper is TORTURE here) at some point.

Also, be advised that JLLM trends towards smut.
creator: Syndicalist13
